creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
from a stream to a waterfall, it needs to leave its comfort zone & fall from a height ✨🏞️💦🍃🌿✨this is @destination_srilanka most beautiful waterfall #bomburufalls #srilanka #youwillcomebackformore 

📍located at the central highlands of Sri Lanka, Bomburu Ella falls is about 50 m in height and 20 m in width and consists of several small waterfalls grouped together. It took us over an hour to track through the forest to see this majestic site
